# defectdojo_network_location (Resource)

DefectDojo Network Location

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_network_location" "example" {
  location = "VPN"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `location` (String) Location of network testing: Examples: VPN, Internet or Internal

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import defectdojo_network_location.example 123
```
